today.name: CREOSOTE
today.nextAction: v0.4.14 — SCHEME C LENS COLOUR-CODING (user pick from creosote_lens_color_schemes.html): lenses now come in three lamp colours like the real consoles — AMBER stock, GREEN for engaged toggles (AUTO REL when on), RED for the limiter LIMIT danger tile. Selectors are stock amber with NO module lean (accLean 0, uniform everywhere); VALUE tiles lean visibly toward their module warmth (accLean 2.5 — GRIT coral, AMBER gold; cool COMPRESS still gated to amber, aqua only in strip+rail). Includes all v0.4.13 fixes (amber ramp, module-power lamps, compact-tile readability). VERIFY IN ABLETON: AUTO REL green when ON / amber when OFF; LIMIT tile reads red; GRIT vs AMBER value tiles clearly differ in warmth while selectors match; COMPRESS values stay amber with aqua strips. Remaining UI punch-list unchanged.
